hooks.command: cd /Users/jacin/Documents/ima-guesthouse/app && [ -z "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; git add . && git commit -m "Update: $(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//')" && git push origin main && DEPLOY_URL=$(vercel deploy --prod --yes 2>&1 | grep -o 'https://ima-guesthouse-[^ ]*\.vercel\.app' | head -1) && [ -n "$DEPLOY_URL" ] && vercel alias set "$DEPLOY_URL" ima-guesthouse.vercel.app 2>/dev/null; exit 0
hooks.statusMessage: Pushing to GitHub & deploying to Vercel...
